# Copilot Instructions for pos-kiosco

- **Primary workflows**: `npm start` runs Angular dev server with proxy; `npm run dev` runs Angular + Electron (wait-on + electron); `npm run electron` opens Electron against the current server; `npm test` runs `ng test` (Vitest underneath). See scripts in [package.json](package.json).
- **Architecture**: Angular 21 standalone components with SCSS default; routes defined in [src/app/app.routes.ts](src/app/app.routes.ts) use a `ShellComponent` wrapper and `cashierGuard` to protect authenticated areas. Root bootstrap is in [src/main.ts](src/main.ts) with providers from [src/app/app.config.ts](src/app/app.config.ts).
- **Electron bridge**: [electron/main.js](electron/main.js) reads `kiosk.json` from `%ProgramData%/MiKioscoEdu/pos-kiosco/kiosk.json`, logs in via `/pos/session/login`, caches the kiosk token, and exposes `kiosk:getConfig` and `kiosk:login`. [electron/preload.js](electron/preload.js) exposes `window.kiosk.getConfig/login`, consumed by frontend boot.
- **Config bootstrap**: `APP_INITIALIZER` in [src/app/app.config.ts](src/app/app.config.ts) calls [KioskConfigService](src/app/core/api/kiosk-config.service.ts) to load config from the Electron bridge; in browser dev it falls back to `environment.apiBaseUrl` (`/api/v1`).
- **HTTP base & proxy**: [ApiService](src/app/core/api/api.service.ts) builds URLs from loaded kiosk config or [src/environments/environment.ts](src/environments/environment.ts). Dev proxy [proxy.conf.json](proxy.conf.json) routes `/api/v1` to `http://192.168.1.39:3000`.
- **Auth flow**: [KioskBootstrapService](src/app/core/auth/kiosk-bootstrap.service.ts) ensures a kiosk token (mocked in browser; real via Electron). [KioskAuthService](src/app/core/auth/kiosk-auth.service.ts) uses it to POST `/pos/cashier/login` and stores `cashier_token` in `localStorage`. [CashierAuthService](src/app/core/auth/cashier-auth.service.ts) manages cashier user state via signals and logout navigation. `authInterceptor` in [src/app/core/auth/auth.interceptor.ts](src/app/core/auth/auth.interceptor.ts) attaches `Authorization: Bearer cashier_token` to requests except kiosk/cashier login endpoints; `cashierGuard` in [src/app/core/auth/cashier.guard.ts](src/app/core/auth/cashier.guard.ts) redirects to `/login` when missing token.
- **UI state signals**: [UiService](src/app/core/services/ui.service.ts) owns page title/subtitle, online flag, and session-open flag; polls `/cash-sessions/summary` every 10s to update status. Components set titles on init (e.g., Sale, Cash session, Transactions).
- **Cash sessions**: [ShiftsService](src/app/core/services/shifts.service.ts) hits `/cash-sessions/summary`, `/cash-sessions/close`, and `/cash-sessions/cash-movement`. [CashSessionComponent](src/app/features/cash/cash-session.ts) computes balances from summary, allows closing with `countedCash`, and prints Z report via [PrintingService](src/app/core/services/printing.service.ts). [OpenSessionModalComponent](src/app/features/pos/session/open-session/open-session-modal.ts) opens sessions via `/cash-sessions/open`.
- **POS sales**: [SaleComponent](src/app/features/pos/sale/sale.ts) loads `/products`, maintains cart, supports student account lookup `/pos/students/search`, posts transactions to `/pos/transactions`, and prints tickets. Requires cash session open; shows modal when closed.
- **Transactions/history**: [TransactionsComponent](src/app/features/pos/transactions/transactions.ts) queries `/reports/transactions` for a date range, supports void via `/pos/transactions/{id}/void`, and reprints tickets via [PrintingService](src/app/core/services/printing.service.ts).
- **Printing**: [PrintingService](src/app/core/services/printing.service.ts) builds popup HTML for receipts (`printTicket`) and Z reports (`printZReport`). Amounts are handled in cents in most flows; conversions to pesos occur only for display.
- **Types**: The Electron bridge contract is defined in [src/types/kiosk-bridge.d.ts](src/types/kiosk-bridge.d.ts).
- **Conventions**: Prefer `ApiService` for HTTP to respect dynamic base URL; amounts are usually integers in cents (`priceCents`, `openingBalanceCents`, `totalCents`). Components are standalone with SCSS. Routes guarded by cashier token; do not attach `Authorization` manually when using `authInterceptor`.
- **SSR/Node server**: [src/server.ts](src/server.ts) hosts the Angular SSR build via Express; static assets served from `dist/browser`. Electron production can load the built `dist/pos-kiosco/browser/index.html` (commented in main.js).
- **Gotchas**: If Electron bridge is unavailable (browser dev), kiosk token is mocked; be aware when testing auth flows. Two auth interceptors exist; the app uses `core/auth/auth.interceptor.ts`—keep behavior in sync if editing.

Feel free to extend with backend endpoint details as they stabilize. Ping the team if any section here is unclear or missing nuance.
